title: Live Takeover
blurb: A live takeover — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
_help: LIVE STREAM state: takeover feed showing; WARNING regime cyclic (snow+IV-logo lead-in on warningRestartAt bump; full-screen card every 10 min for 18s; ticker crawl at the 5-min mark; fullscreen/logo + GUIDE pill stay reachable above the card). When the live feed ENDS, the site plays the snow+logo close automatically; to make the return to Dan Schott permanent: cp live.dan-schott.json live.json && npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main. warningHold:true holds the card up. Bump warningRestartAt to replay the snow lead-in.
